message:
Add Exposé-style workspace overview grid

When no tab is selected (click workspace row in sidebar or grid
toolbar button), show a grid of live tab thumbnails. Clicking a
tile selects that tab and exits overview.

- WorkspaceOverviewView: adaptive grid with live snapshot tiles
- SessionDetailView: show overview when selectedTabID is nil
- SidebarView: clicking workspace row clears tab selection
- Toolbar: grid toggle button to enter/exit overview
